nonduplicate_basis: event-driven minimum-one-contract long convexity conditioned on ETF regime; excludes previously eliminated continuous NAV-budget O1-O4 designs
signal_information: official ETF/index information through prior close only
execution: real daily open, prior-day volume, minimum one complete contract/structure, next-open, no Black-Scholes synthetic fill
capital_rule: trade only when full minimum premium plus conservative cost is available; infeasible otherwise; no continuous percentage budget
strict_data_gate: official bid/ask or auditable executable quote, official expiry and cash settlement, complete company actions, five non-overlapping W24 blocks
approximate_tier: daily_open_no_quotes may screen economics but can never promote strict
